summary: Completed testing of Anchr app rebranding and new features. Backend APIs working perfectly (32/32 tests passed). Frontend branding and UI elements working correctly. Critical login form submission issue prevents testing of authenticated features.

ui_bugs.issue: Login form not submitting to backend API - no network request detected
ui_bugs.details: Form fills correctly but clicking Sign In button does not trigger /api/auth/login request. User stays on login page. Backend auth works via curl.

integration_issues.details: Login form appears functional but does not communicate with backend. Prevents access to all authenticated features.

passed_tests: Branding: 'Anchr' displayed on login page and mobile
UI elements: Sign In/Sign Up tabs, email/password inputs, login button
Language switching: English/Danish toggle works correctly
Anchor icon present and styled correctly
All new Anchr backend APIs: urge-types, programs, habits, buddies, insights
Program enrollment and day completion APIs
Habit creation, toggle, and deletion APIs
Buddy system APIs (with mocked alert endpoint)
Profile update API for urge type selection
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical login form submission issue. The frontend login form is not sending requests to /api/auth/login endpoint. Backend authentication works perfectly via curl, but frontend form submission is broken. This blocks testing of all authenticated features (dashboard, programs, habits, settings, etc.). Check form submission handlers, event listeners, and API integration in the login component.
